path: Problem: Compute an average for a group with multiple inclusion/exclusion criteria and return blank when no matching records exist
Observation: AVERAGEIFS returns a #DIV/0! error when no rows meet all criteria; IFERROR can convert this to a blank output
Problem: Exclude records based on a status keyword while averaging
Action: Use a wildcard-based not-equal criteria in AVERAGEIFS (e.g., "<>*keyword*")
Observation: Wildcards in criteria allow partial text matching; "<>*keyword*" excludes any status containing the keyword anywhere in the text
